questions.question: Complement of a regular set is —
questions.explanation: Regular set বা regular language complement operation-এর অধীনে closed। অর্থাৎ যদি কোনো language regular হয়, তাহলে তার complement-ও regular। Regular languages সব Boolean operation (union, intersection, complement)-এর অধীনে closed।

questions.question: Number of steps required to get "aab" from A → aA|a|b —
questions.explanation: A → aA|a|b grammar থেকে "aab" derive করতে: Step 1: A → aA, Step 2: aA → aaA, Step 3: aaA → aab। মোট 3টি ধাপ লাগে।
